_note: These records are real IOCs reproduced from abuse.ch's own official ThreatFox API documentation (used there as illustrative examples of the API response schema). They are NOT invented for this project. They are bundled here so APT Hunter India can run a fully offline demo with real (if older) IOC data when no live Auth-Key is supplied. For current, live data, run with --auth-key (see threatfox_client.py docstring for how to get a free key from https://auth.abuse.ch/).
_snapshot_captured: 2026-06-20 (from abuse.ch ThreatFox API documentation page, not a live API pull)
